messages.text:
BL-553 — QuotaManager Slice 1 — read-only role/provider availability check over existing rate-limit cooldown + BL-551 cost ledger
Approval context: See BL-552's approval_context for the nesting question (standalone
QuotaManager vs a slice inside BL-525/BL-547). This ticket is scoped small
enough to be safe either way: it is a pure read-only query module with no
new persisted state and no caller wired in yet, so it can be re-homed
without rewor…
BL-553 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-553" (or "reject BL-553 <reason>") to act.
